MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Laura Martinez
Lawrence Wong, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Wing Fai (Gary) Choi and Alice Choi were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kam Cheung (Jack) Tai as follows:
Costs $946.60
Attorney fees $25,000.00
Total Damages $1,828.276.10.
Judgment signed in open court. See scanned judgment details.
